steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to compare the sizes of the two mountain ranges. The relevant data is 1,141 mi² for El Carmen-Verde and 63 mi² for the Sierrita Mountains.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — generalizes about size variation: Does not compare these two ranges using actual figures. ✗
  • Choice B — '1,141 mi² versus 63 mi²': Puts both measurements side-by-side, directly achieving the comparison goal. ✓
  • Choice C — omits size information: No comparison possible without figures. ✗
  • Choice D — defines sky islands instead: Off-topic; substitutes a definition for the required size comparison. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
